# Pricing

## Starter
$29/month
- 3 projects
- 2 seats
- Community support

## Pro
$99/month
- Unlimited projects
- 10 seats
- Priority support

## Enterprise
Custom pricing
- Unlimited everything
- SSO & audit logs
- Dedicated CSM

# Plans

| Plan | Price (billed annually) | Includes |
|---|---|---|
| Basic | $190/year | 1 workspace, 5 GB storage |
| Team | $490/year | 5 workspaces, 100 GB storage, SAML |

# Pay as you go

Our API is priced per request: $0.002 per call, volume discounts above 1M calls/month. No seats, no tiers.
